## Approved Issue

<!-- Required for external contributors. Link the open issue approved with status:approved. Example: Fixes #123 -->

Fixes #

## Human Explanation

<!-- In plain human words: what changed, why was this the right fix, and what should reviewers look at first? -->

## AI Assistance

<!-- Required. Say "None" if no AI tool materially shaped this PR. Otherwise name the tool, what it generated or changed, what you personally reviewed, and what tests you ran. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New provider
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Testing

- [ ] I ran `swift build` and it succeeded
- [ ] I ran `swift test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I tested the change locally with `./script/build_and_run.sh`
- [ ] I can explain how this change works in human words

## Screenshots

<!-- Required for UI/visual changes: include before and after screenshots. Write "Not applicable" for non-visual changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My PR targets the `main` branch
- [ ] My PR implements only the approved issue scope
- [ ] **Behavior change?** I updated the matching `docs/` page(s) in this same PR (required when user-visible behavior changes — a docs/code mismatch is treated as a bug)
- [ ] I did not introduce new dependencies without justification
- [ ] If this adds or changes a provider, the linked issue includes demand evidence and feasibility proof
